svg.title: Module boundaries as seams — good vs anti-pattern
svg.desc: Two side-by-side monolith diagrams. Left shows the anti-pattern: horizontal layers (models, routes, services) with every feature scattered across all layers. Right shows the correct approach: vertical domain modules (orders, drivers, payments, notifications) each owning their full stack, with clean seams between them that enable future extraction.
svg.text: Every feature touches every layer — no seams
Each module extractable independently — seams enable migration
